name: Children’s Park
description: Children’s Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sioux Center, IA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: City Hall Orange City
description: City Hall Orange City is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Orange City, IA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: City Hall Pickleball
description: City Hall Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Orange City, IA. There is 1 indoor wood court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Northwestern College
description: Come play pickleball at Northwestern College in Orange City, IA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights.

name: Orange City Iowa Public Courts
description: Courts are in Vets Park, across from Kinderspeilland wooden children’s playground.

name: Orange City Puddle Jumper
description: Orange City Puddle Jumper is a place to play pickleball in Orange City, IA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.
